title: DataNex Website — Full Rebuild with 3+ Years Experience, 2023 Founded, and Enhanced Features

requirements.summary: Update all experience references to '3+ years' and founding year to '2023' throughout the site
acceptanceCriteria: Hero stat panel shows '3+' for years experience
About section text reads '3+ years of hands-on experience'
Footer reads 'Founded 2023'
No instance of '2–3 years' remains anywhere on the site

file_operations.description: Update the stat counters and any experience text in the hero section to display '3+' years of experience instead of '2-3 years'. Update the founding year reference to 2023 if present in badges or text.
Update the footer to display 'Founded 2023' badge in the brand column below the logo. Ensure copyright line reflects 2023 as the starting year.
Review and update any meta descriptions or page-level text that references experience years or founding date to use '3+ years' and '2023'.

requirements.summary: Rebuild Hero section with animated data-visualization SVG, typewriter effect for specialties, and enhanced visual design
acceptanceCriteria: Typewriter cycling text is visible beneath the main headline
Animated SVG pipeline motif renders in the hero background or alongside the headline
Particle canvas, stats panel, ticker, and scroll hint remain functional
Hero is fully responsive on mobile

file_operations.description: Replace the plain initials placeholder with an animated SVG data-pipeline visualization showing live-drawing lines suggesting a scraping pipeline. Add a typewriter effect component that cycles through specialties: 'Web Scraping', 'Data Research', 'Lead Generation', 'Market Intelligence'. Integrate the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/data-pipeline-illustration.dim_800x600.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg-pattern.dim_1920x1080.png as background elements. Preserve existing particle canvas, stats panel, ticker, and scroll hint functionality.

Create a reusable typewriter effect component that cycles through an array of strings with typing and deleting animations. Accept props for strings array, typing speed, delete speed, and pause duration.

Create an animated SVG component showing a data scraping pipeline with live-drawing paths, nodes, and connection lines. Use navy and gold colors. Animate paths using CSS or SVG animations to suggest data flowing through the pipeline.

requirements.summary: Add 'Live Data Feed' marquee ticker strip between Hero and About sections with animated mock data rows
acceptanceCriteria: Ticker strip appears between hero and about sections
Rows animate in continuously (looped)
Columns include at least: Source, Records, Status, Accuracy
Uses monospace font and gold/green accent colors matching the theme

file_operations.description: Create a marquee ticker component displaying real-time-style animated data rows with columns: Source, Records, Status, Accuracy. Use monospace font and navy/gold theme colors. Rows should scroll continuously in an infinite loop. Style to look like terminal output with dark background.
Wire the LiveDataFeed component into the page structure between the HeroSection and the About section (or next visible section).

requirements.summary: Redesign About section with professional profile card showing avatar with animated ring, credentials, platform badges, and accuracy card
acceptanceCriteria: Profile card renders with animated gold ring around avatar
Name, title, and founding year badges are visible
Platform badges row (Upwork, Fiverr, LinkedIn) is present
99.2% accuracy card is retained

file_operations.description: Create the About section with a two-column layout: left side shows a professional profile card with initials avatar (JG), animated gold ring border, name 'Jay Gohil', title 'Data Research Specialist & Founder', founding badge '2023', platform badges row (Upwork, Fiverr, LinkedIn icons), and 99.2% accuracy decorative card. Right side contains the about text describing 3+ years of hands-on experience. Use generated logo frontend/public/assets/generated/datanex-logo-icon.dim_256x256.png if appropriate.
Create a reusable profile card component with animated gold ring border using CSS keyframes, displaying avatar/initials, name, title, badges, and platform icons.
Wire the AboutSection component into the page layout after the LiveDataFeed component.

requirements.summary: Add interactive 'Data Scope Estimator' tool with dynamic delivery timeline and complexity badge
acceptanceCriteria: All four input controls are interactive and functional
Estimated delivery time updates dynamically as inputs change
Complexity badge updates based on volume and frequency selections
CTA button scrolls to the contact section
Section is fully responsive

file_operations.description: Create an interactive estimator tool section with four controls: Target Website Type dropdown (E-commerce, Directory, Social, News, Custom), Volume slider (1K–1M records), Output Format radio/select (CSV/Excel/JSON/MySQL), and Frequency select (One-time/Weekly/Monthly). Display a dynamically calculated estimated delivery timeline and complexity badge (Simple/Moderate/Complex/Enterprise) based on inputs. Include CTA button 'Request This Dataset →' that scrolls to #contact anchor. Ensure full responsiveness at mobile breakpoints.
Wire the DataScopeEstimator component into the page between the Services section and the Projects section.

requirements.summary: Enhance Projects section with category filter tabs and add 2 new project cards
acceptanceCriteria: Filter tabs appear above the project grid
Clicking a tab filters visible cards with animation
Two new project cards appear in the grid
'All' tab shows all 5 projects
Each new card includes category, title, description, result metric, and tech chips

file_operations.description: Add a filter tab bar above the project grid with tabs: All, E-commerce, B2B Research, Lead Gen, Automation. Implement click handlers to filter visible project cards with smooth CSS transition. Add two new project objects to the projects array: 'Real Estate Listing Intelligence' (property data scraping) and 'News & Media Sentiment Dataset' (news scraping + sentiment tagging). Each new card must include category, title, description, result metric, and tech stack chips. Ensure the filter updates both the gallery and the modal view.

requirements.summary: Add 'Client Testimonials' carousel section with 4 cards, auto-advance, and navigation controls
acceptanceCriteria: Testimonial section renders with at least 4 cards
Carousel auto-advances every 5 seconds
Prev/next buttons and dot indicators are functional
Each card shows name, company, flag, stars, quote, and a metric
Section is responsive (single card view on mobile)

file_operations.description: Update the existing TestimonialCarousel to include 4 distinct testimonial cards with client name, company, country flag emoji, 5-star rating, quote, and key metric (e.g., '250K records delivered'). Ensure auto-advance every 5 seconds, prev/next arrow buttons, and dot indicators are functional. Responsive layout should show single card on mobile viewports.
Wire the TestimonialCarousel component into the page between the Why Choose Us section and the Counter Strip (DataCounterDashboard).

requirements.summary: Add 'Pricing & Packages' section with three tiered plan cards and custom quote note
acceptanceCriteria: Three pricing cards render with correct tier names, prices, and features
Professional plan is visually highlighted as recommended
Each card has a CTA button linking to the contact section
USD note and custom quote mention are present
Section is responsive (stacked on mobile)

file_operations.description: Create a Pricing & Packages section with three tiered cards: Starter ($49, up to 5K records, CSV, 3-day delivery), Professional ($149, up to 50K records, CSV/Excel/JSON, 5-day delivery, MySQL storage, highlighted as recommended), and Enterprise (Custom, 100K+ records, all formats, dedicated pipeline, ongoing support). Each card shows features list and a CTA button linking to #contact. Include a note: 'All prices in USD. Custom quotes available for complex projects.' Ensure responsive stacking on mobile.
Wire the PricingPackages component into the page after the TestimonialCarousel section.

requirements.summary: Add animated Terminal/Code Window component in Technologies section showing typing Python script
acceptanceCriteria: Terminal window component renders with macOS-style title bar dots
Code types itself out character-by-character in an infinite loop
Syntax highlighting uses gold for keywords and slate/green for comments/strings
Component is positioned in or near the Technologies section

file_operations.description: Create a decorative terminal window component with macOS-style title bar (red/yellow/green dots), dark background, and a typing animation that displays a mock Python scraping script character-by-character in an infinite loop. Apply syntax highlighting using gold for keywords and slate/green for strings/comments, matching the brand palette.
Integrate the TerminalWindow component into the Technologies section layout, positioning it as a right-side decorative panel alongside the existing skill bars and tech stack badges.

requirements.summary: Add sticky 'Quick Contact' pill button that appears after 300px scroll
acceptanceCriteria: Button is hidden on initial load and appears after 300px scroll
Button has gold background with navy text, pill shape
Clicking it scrolls to the #contact section
Does not overlap or conflict with other fixed UI elements
Visible on both desktop and mobile

file_operations.description: Create a sticky floating pill button with text 'Get a Free Quote' that slides in from bottom-right after scrolling 300px. Style with gold background, navy text, and pill shape. On click, smoothly scroll to #contact section. Position to avoid overlap with existing FloatingContactButton.
Wire the QuickContactPill component into the App, rendering it as a fixed overlay element.

requirements.summary: Update contact form to store submissions in Motoko backend and retrieve stored messages
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form submission calls the backend submitContactMessage function
Backend stores submitted data in a stable array across upgrades
getMessages returns all stored messages
Frontend shows the same success/error toast after submission
Form resets on successful submission

file_operations.description: Create a contact form component with fields: name, email, company (optional), budget, service (multi-select), and message. On submit, call the backend submitContactMessage function using the actor from useActor hook. Display success/error toast feedback. Reset form on successful submission. Use the backend interface types from frontend/src/backend.d.ts.
Wire the ContactForm component into the page as the Contact section with id='contact' to support scroll anchors.

requirements.summary: Update Counter Strip with correct metrics aligned to 3+ years experience and 2023 founding
acceptanceCriteria: Counter strip shows exactly these four metrics with correct values
All counters animate from 0 to target value on scroll
Gold background counter strip is visually consistent with design

file_operations.description: Update the counter data to display: Records Scraped: 2.4M+, Projects Delivered: 60+, Data Accuracy Rate: 99.2%, Industries Served: 7+. Ensure all counters animate from 0 to target value using the existing useCounterAnimation hook when scrolled into view. Maintain gold background styling.

requirements.summary: Update footer copyright to '© 2023–2026 DataNex Research Solutions · Jay Gohil · All Rights Reserved' and verify links
acceptanceCriteria: Copyright reads '© 2023–2026 DataNex Research Solutions'
Founded 2023 badge is visible in the footer brand column
All footer nav links resolve to correct page sections

file_operations.description: Update the copyright line to read '© 2023–2026 DataNex Research Solutions · Jay Gohil · All Rights Reserved'. Ensure the 'Founded 2023' badge appears in the brand column below the logo. Verify all footer navigation links point to correct section anchors (#about, #services, #projects, #contact, etc.).

requirements.summary: Ensure full mobile responsiveness for all new and existing sections at 375px, 768px, and 1200px breakpoints
acceptanceCriteria: No horizontal overflow at 375px viewport width
All new sections stack vertically on mobile
Carousel shows single card on mobile
Pricing cards stack vertically on mobile
Terminal window scales down gracefully on small screens

file_operations.description: Add Tailwind responsive classes to ensure the ticker strips and data rows display correctly at 375px, 768px, and 1200px breakpoints. Prevent horizontal overflow.
Add responsive Tailwind classes to stack input controls vertically on mobile and ensure the estimator layout adapts to 375px, 768px, and 1200px breakpoints.
Ensure carousel shows single card on mobile (375px) and adapts layout for tablet (768px) and desktop (1200px) breakpoints using Tailwind responsive prefixes.
Apply responsive Tailwind classes to stack pricing cards vertically on mobile (375px) and adapt grid layout for tablet and desktop breakpoints.
Add responsive styling to scale down the terminal window gracefully on small screens, adjusting font size and padding using Tailwind responsive prefixes.
Ensure the About section profile card and text stack vertically on mobile and adapt to tablet/desktop layouts using Tailwind responsive classes.
Verify filter tabs and project cards adapt correctly to mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints. Ensure no horizontal overflow at 375px.
